methodology.allergens: Essential-only: 16-tag vocabulary (Celery, Gluten, Crustaceans, Fish, Eggs, Lupin, Molluscs, Mustard, Nuts, Peanuts, Sesame, Soya, Sulphites, Sugared drink, Dairy, Lentils). Mexican mapping: flour tortilla/maida/breaded -> Gluten; corn tortilla excluded from Gluten (pure masa). Cheese/queso/crema/sour cream/yoghurt -> Dairy. Mayo/aioli/egg -> Eggs. Beans (black/pinto/refried) -> Lentils (legume convention). Shrimp/camarones -> Crustaceans; dory/tilapia/fish -> Fish. Mole dishes auto-tagged Sesame+Nuts+Peanuts. Sugary sodas (Coca-Cola/Sprite/Fanta/Jarritos non-zero) -> Sugared drink; Zero variants excluded. Semi-finished components expanded before tag resolution. Pickled jalapenos, limes, vinegars NOT flagged for Sulphites. Packaging excluded from allergen and kcal calc.
methodology.calories: Per-100g estimates applied to EP quantities (KG/L -> 1000g, GM/ML -> grams, Piece -> 50g nominal). SF components resolved by weighted-kcal of composition. Packaging excluded. Wastage not applied. Integer-rounded. Key values: Corn tortilla 218, Flour tortilla 306, Chicken breast 165, Beef 250, Shrimp 99, Dory/Fish 120, Black beans 132, Pinto 143, Refried 180, Mexican rice 200, Cheddar 404, Mozzarella 280, Cotija 368, Crema 450, Sour cream 198, Guacamole 150, Avocado 160, Salsa verde 30, Salsa 35, Pico de gallo 28, Mayo 680, Ranch 430, Coca-Cola 42, Fanta 48, Jarritos 52, Zero-sugar 0.

changelog.entry: Initial extraction from Mexican Recipes 14112025.xlsx. Flat pool (no brand column) — 84 finished recipes across 15 categories, 27 semi-finished components. SF expansion, essential-only allergen enrichment, per-100g calorie estimates.
Drift fix: normalized ingredient/packaging shape to canonical 5-key {name, quantity, unit, wastage_pct, notes}.
